summary: Transcripts live: 19 distilled (24 takes+5 metaNotes; izen nudged 5 M+ projections). Tiers+metrics 0 moves. WCL rdps-broken: 5 cuts unreachable, 3 raw landed. No new build.

sources.detail: All 6 pages (raid+M+, all roles) fetched live via curl; parsed table.tier-list rows (img spec-icons alt + class-slug, description spell icons excluded). Era-verified Midnight/Season 1/Devourer. 80 assignments (40 raid + 40 M+), 0 unmatched, 0 tier moves vs stored.

Both pages fetched live; parsed tier__tier s/a/b/c blocks via images/icons/spec/<class>/<spec>.png slugs. Era-verified (Devourer present). Raid 39 (Vengeance DH still omitted upstream — absence, not error), M+ 40 = 79 rows, 0 moves vs stored.

All 6 pages fetched via r.jina.ai; tank-M+ page recovered this run with a cache opt-out (x-no-cache) after the default returned the 282b tracker-probe. Numbered rankings parsed leniently (missing-space/missing-paren idioms). Era-verified Midnight Season 1. 80 rows (40+40), 0 unmatched, 0 moves vs stored.

All 6 raid(throughput)/M+(score) pages parsed from __NEXT_DATA__ specTierListSection via /wow/builds/<spec>/<class>/ slugs; 80 rows, 0 unmatched, upstream lastUpdated raid 2026-07-16T12Z / M+ 2026-07-17T12Z. 0 moves vs stored. specRankingsSection numbers re-parsed (160 cells: 95th-pct DPS/HPS, M+ score, Popularity) — 0 value changes.

Full re-fetch of all 9 raid bosses (throughput) + 8 M+ dungeons (score) across all 3 roles (51 pages); every encounter parsed 40/40 specs from __NEXT_DATA__. 680 cells, 0 unmatched, 0 changed vs stored; encounter-tiers.json asOf already 2026-07-17.

Survivability tierList returned EMPTY (tiers: []) on all 3 raid pages again this fetch — transient upstream state (throughput on the same pages was full 27/7/6). Nothing to parse; stored 40 survivability rows left unchanged at asOf 2026-07-17 (within the 10-day threshold). Not an error.

All 3 M+ pages (DPS/Healer/Tank) fetched via r.jina.ai cache opt-out; Rankings-table Tier column parsed by spec-slug URL (X/Unranked skipped), 40 specs matched. Era-verified MN 12.0.7. 0 moves vs stored. Raid pages still 0-records upstream — left unranked (snapshot null).

Per the pre-agent deterministic WCL fetch step (wcl-fetch/evidence.json, verdict rdps-broken, attemptedAt 2026-07-17T16:55Z): characterRankings(metric: rdps) returns a bare Internal server error on encounter 3176 — the redistributed-credit metric family is still broken upstream. Agent holds no WCL credentials and did not fetch warcraftlogs.com. Zone 46 Mythic medians unchanged at the 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); no zone 47 M+ cut can honestly land. Data unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 54 (all 3 role cuts) cannot land. 12.1 PTR raid-testing normalized scores unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 56 (DPS/tank/healer) cannot land. 12.1 PTR M+ testing rDPS/HPS metrics unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 52 Dummy Dome aggregate=amount median rDPS cannot land. spec.ptrDummy unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.

The deterministic src/fetch-wcl.mjs step (frozen recipe) paginated each DPS dummy metric:dps leaderboard and merged 103 per-spec raw-DPS medians before the agent started (evidence.landed wcl-dummy-raw = 103 rows; players 1T:2000 2T:160 3T:111 5T:1532). Agent did not re-fetch or edit these rows; asOf 2026-07-17.

The deterministic fetch step pooled zone-54 Heroic best-parse raw-DPS across 8 bosses (6 populated: Nek'zali 370, Sentinels 363, Vashnik 678, Lost Explorers 150, Sszorak 184, Twin Fangs 146; Coiled Altar and Ula'tek 0 — untested windows) and merged 27 rows (evidence.landed = 27). Agent did not re-fetch or edit; asOf 2026-07-17.

The deterministic fetch step pooled zone-56 S2 PTR key raw-DPS across all 8 dungeons (players 619-2000 each) and merged 27 rows (evidence.landed = 27). Agent did not re-fetch or edit; asOf 2026-07-17.

40/40 rows (27 DPS + 7 healer + 6 tank) fetched live via plain GET; parsed the top-50 avg M+ rating ceiling via the trend-icon-anchored value element (range 3738-4288). Era-verified Midnight Season 1. 0 value changes vs stored.

26/26 non-Augmentation DPS fight profiles fetched via talent_target_scaling/castingpatchwerk; MID1 + ptr:0 confirmed on every chart; best-build DPS at counts 1/2/3/5/8/15. Augmentation absent by design. 0 target changes vs stored.

Nightly MID1_Raid report (.txt) re-fetched: SimulationCraft 1205-01, WoW 12.0.7.68453 Live, hotfix 2026-07-13 — era-verified, no season flip. 26/26 DPS specs parsed as best variant per spec from the DPS Ranking; 0 value deltas vs stored. Augmentation excluded by design.

Period 1072 MID1 (unchanged period; era-verified, Fortified/Tyrannical) re-fetched via r.jina.ai /period/latest; per-spec representation reconstructed (class-group x within-class fraction). Same period = same distribution (matches stored within +/-0.1 two-step rounding); no real change, data left at 2026-07-17.

Forum thread (Discourse .json) + Wowhead news RSS both checked live. Thread tops at post #15 (Linxy Rogue Outlaw addendum, 07-14 22:46Z) under already-logged build #14 — NO new forum build. RSS newest 12.1 items are 07-16 or older, all prior-triaged (07-16 Class Tuning Hotfixes = PTR hotfixes, no forum post; 07-16 Holy Paladin + 07-12 Frost Mage reviews already have writeups; 07-14 datamined recap = no clear per-spec verdict). ptr-builds.json unchanged; no writeups fabricated. zone-54/52/56 evidence-only (rdps-broken).

TRANSCRIPT_API_KEY now configured — transcript-fetch/summary.json verdict ok, 19/20 fetched (supadata native, ms offsets); LHPjq9142qM errored (invalid-request), stays pending. Distilled 24 specialist takes + 5 izen metaNotes across Obli/Shadarek/Kalamazi/YoDaTV/Tettles/MadSkillzzTV/AutomaticJak; older MadSkillzz healer-testing iterations + Supatease roundup + Tettles gearing transcript-verified-skipped. 31 older takes superseded; izen M+ notes nudged 5 projections (Arcane Mage/Frost DK/Ele Sham/Balance/Devourer). All 25 RSS feeds polled (25/25 OK); no new in-scope videos vs seen-set. Pending queue 20 to 1.
